name: Int to String
asm_code:
jmp end_macro_{ID}
{OUTPUT_VAR} db '     ', 0
int_to_string_{ID}:
    pusha
    mov bx, 10
    mov di, {OUTPUT_VAR}
    add di, 4
    mov byte [di+1], 0
.clean_{ID}:
    mov byte [di], ' '
    dec di
    cmp di, {OUTPUT_VAR}
    jge .clean_{ID}
    add di, 4
.loop_{ID}:
    xor dx, dx
    div bx
    add dl, '0'
    mov [di], dl
    dec di
    or ax, ax
    jnz .loop_{ID}
    popa
    ret
end_macro_{ID}:
mov al, [{INPUT_VAR}]
mov ah, 0
mov di, {OUTPUT_VAR}
call int_to_string_{ID}
mov si, {OUTPUT_VAR}
